title: 金鯱賞の後に・受け継いだ光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru bestows onto Meisho Doto a
ray of light, signaling good luck and a successful
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having received this ray of light, we head for the
Takarazuka Kinen. This will be the test to
determine whether Meisho Doto can become the
knight to protect T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur informs me that, at last, Meisho Doto's
numbers are sufficient to exert her full potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a problem lies ahead. Meisho Doto,
T.M. Opera O, and Air Shakur must all push
themselves past their limits.
